final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing infographic explaining definitions and relationships between AI concepts.

Style/medium: hand-drawn sketch style infographic, casual pen-and-paper aesthetic, playful doodle illustrations
Composition: clear visual hierarchy with concept nodes connected by relationship arrows, flowchart-style layout
Subject: six interconnected tech concepts — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each with simple icon and brief definition
Scene/backdrop: clean white or off-white paper texture background, plenty of breathing room between elements
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting, friendly and approachable educational tone
Color palette: limited 3-4 color scheme (black ink lines, one accent color for highlights, subtle paper tone)
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must be readable at web size; visual relationships between concepts must be clear through connecting lines; no overlapping text
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; complex 3D; corporate stock illustration style; cluttered layout; tiny unreadable text
